website_url: Coming soon (landing page live as of early 2026)
business_model: Private physician-led health advisory integrating surgical medicine, functional medicine, and integrative dental medicine into one coordinated strategy for executives and high-performing professionals. High-touch, ongoing advisory relationships — not episodic clinical visits.
business_stage: Pre-revenue launch (brand formed, LLC registered, landing page in development as of Feb 2026)
headquarters: Multi-state (Dr. Skeens: South Carolina; Dr. Pastouk: Ohio/Cleveland)

company_positioning.category_definition: Strategic Medical Advisory vs. Executive Health Programs vs. Functional Medicine Clinics
company_positioning.category_creation_strategy: Aligness™ is not a clinic, a wellness practice, or an executive physical program. It is a physician-led strategic advisory — the health equivalent of a Goldman Sachs advisory relationship. Category framing positions Aligness as the answer to the coordination gap that all existing executive health models fail to address.
company_positioning.market_positioning: The only executive health advisory integrating surgical medicine, functional medicine, and integrative dental medicine into one coordinated, longitudinal strategy for leaders who already have excellent individual specialists but no unified oversight.
company_positioning.unique_value_proposition: Aligness gives high-performing executives what they give their companies but never give themselves: coordinated strategic oversight across all domains, delivered by physicians who operate at the surgical and systems level simultaneously.
company_positioning.competitive_differentiation: Advisory model (ongoing) vs. evaluation model (episodic); integrates dental medicine as a core clinical domain (unique); surgeon-level pathology insight combined with systems medicine; private and confidential — not a consumer wellness brand

core_offers.primary_service: Executive Health Advisory — ongoing, coordinated strategic health oversight integrating surgical insight, functional medicine assessment, and oral-systemic evaluation. Delivered through private consultation and longitudinal monitoring.
core_offers.service_model: Strategic advisory relationship, not clinical appointments. Analogous to a retained strategic consultant rather than a specialist visit.
secondary_services: Systems Alignment Assessment — initial multi-domain health mapping using proprietary frameworks
Lab interpretation across specialties with trend analysis
Proactive health strategy design and longitudinal planning
Speaking engagements and thought leadership (Dr. Skeens)

target_markets: Fortune 500 CEOs, founders, PE partners, venture-backed operators
High-net-worth professionals: attorneys, healthcare executives, professional athletes
$500K+ annual income or significant investable net worth
Individuals accustomed to concierge-level strategic advisory in finance and law
Executives experiencing: fragmented specialist care, cognitive decline, 'normal' labs with abnormal symptoms, no unified health strategy
mission_statement: To give high-performing executives what they give their companies but never give themselves: coordinated, intelligent, strategic medical oversight built on integration rather than fragmentation.
vision_statement: To create a new category in healthcare — the strategic health advisory — where executives receive the same coordinated, longitudinal oversight for their health as they do for their finances and legal affairs.
core_values: Coordination as the highest-value health investment
Surgical precision applied to systems thinking
Advisory over episodic — longitudinal relationship, not one-time assessment
competitive_advantages: Only executive health model integrating integrative dental medicine as a core clinical domain
Dual surgical and systems medicine expertise — Dr. Skeens brings what no functional medicine doctor has: 25 years of surgical-level pathology insight
Uncontested positioning in the coordination gap — no major competitor speaks to this space on LinkedIn
Co-founder model reinforces multi-domain integration narrative
Published author (Unshackled) and national media features establish thought authority outside medical circles
Advisor not clinician positioning — higher perceived value, lower regulatory exposure in content

direct: Mark Hyman / Function Health — mass consumer functional medicine, education-first model, not advisory
Peter Attia / Early Medical — longevity science and protocol optimization, individual-focused, not coordination-focused
Cleveland Clinic Executive Health Program — evaluation model, episodic, PDF delivery, no ongoing coordination
indirect: Executive health programs at major academic medical centers
competitors.blue_ocean_territory: The coordination gap between specialists. No major competitor is speaking to this space on LinkedIn or building a product specifically designed to solve it for executives.

distribution_channels: LinkedIn thought leadership (primary — both co-founders posting)
Warm referrals and professional network introductions
Speaking engagements and national medical conferences
Book (Unshackled) as long-form credibility and lead generation

brand_assets.visual_identity: Luxury black, gold, and stone neutrals — surgical precision meets executive credibility
brand_assets.tone_positioning: Think Goldman Sachs for your health team — not a wellness brand, not a clinic, not an app

current_challenges: Brand is new — zero existing LinkedIn presence, website, or digital footprint for Aligness specifically
Both co-founders have existing LinkedIn accounts under their individual brands that need to be repositioned
Neither co-founder has time to manage content independently — requires fully done-for-you execution
Medical regulatory constraints limit explicit outcome claims in all content
No leads or clients yet — building from zero to qualified inbound simultaneously with brand building
Category creation challenge: executive audience does not yet have language for 'health advisory' as a concept
NDA-protected client work limits case study availability in early stages
short_term_goals: Establish Aligness™ as a distinct, recognizable category in executive health on LinkedIn within 90 days
Generate qualified inbound interest leading to private strategy calls
Grow both co-founder LinkedIn profiles with coordinated, differentiated content
Build email list through lead magnets tied to the coordination gap problem
Position Dr. Skeens as the primary LinkedIn authority voice for Aligness
long_term_goals: Become the defining brand in executive health advisory — the category creator for coordinated health oversight
Build a portfolio of private executive advisory relationships as the core revenue engine
Expand national speaking presence and media authority
Leverage Unshackled as ongoing thought leadership and lead generation anchor

ecosystem_strategy.aligness: Primary brand — coordinated executive health advisory for high-performers
ecosystem_strategy.bellasee: Dr. Skeens' existing integrative ophthalmology franchise — separate brand, feeds clinical credibility to Aligness
ecosystem_strategy.unshackled_book: Thought leadership anchor — healthcare reform narrative that positions Dr. Skeens as authority beyond clinical scope
ecosystem_strategy.co_founder_linkedin: Dr. Skeens and Dr. Pastouk each post independently but with coordinated messaging — different clinical angles, same strategic narrative
